chunks.text: June IRIS Server Patching | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar June IRIS Server Patching Microsoft will release their patches for the month on Tuesday, June 11th, 2024. Various IRIS Windows and Linux servers

1th, 2024. Various IRIS Windows and Linux servers will be patched and rebooted Tuesday or Wednesday. PRINT, WINTERM and WDS will automatically patch and reboot Wednesday, June 12th, at 3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable until 10:00am Wednesday, depen

may be unavailable until 10:00am Wednesday, depending on additional software updates. Linux servers lists.eecs, iris2.eecs (for access to the network and roster databases), and login.eecs will be patched and rebooted Wednesday night. DNS servers cro

ched and rebooted Wednesday night. DNS servers cronus and rhea may also be briefly unavailable while rebooting at approximately 8:00pm Tuesday. On Wednesday, June 12th, the departmental DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from 10pm to 10:30pm (actu

scheduled for downtime from 10pm to 10:30pm (actual downtime is expected to be shorter than scheduled). UPDATE [2024-06-12 | larsrohr ] Resolved as of 2024-06-12 10:17pm Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled
